description_long: This is a tall, modern office building characterized by a sleek, curved glass facade and a combination of sharp and rounded edges. The exterior is dominated by blue-tinted glass panels set within a light gray structural frame, giving it a contemporary and professional appearance. The building features a prominent convex curve on one side, while the opposite side is more angular, creating a dynamic architectural profile. Vertical lines of windows are regularly spaced, emphasizing the building's height and providing ample natural light to the interior. The roofline is multi-leveled, with mechanical structures and rooftop access points visible. The base of the building includes a recessed entry area, likely serving as the main entrance for occupants and visitors.
description: A tall, modern office building with a curved blue glass facade and a light gray structural frame, featuring regular vertical window patterns and a multi-level roof.
description_view_0: This view highlights the building's prominent curved glass facade and the smooth, continuous surface on one side.
description_view_1: This angle reveals the angular, stepped sections of the building and the main recessed entry area at the base.
description_view_2: This side shows the regular vertical window pattern and the multi-leveled roof structure, with more angular features visible.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the convex, curved rear facade with minimal architectural detailing and no visible entry points.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced vertical strips of rectangular windows, forming a continuous grid across the facade.
